quotes.text: The best love is the kind that awakens the soul and makes us reach for more, that plants a fire in our hearts and brings peace to our minds. And that's what you've given me.
I love you. I am who I am because of you. You are every reason, every hope, and every dream I've ever had.
I want all of you, forever, you and me, every day.
Thirty, flirty, and thriving!
I don't want to be afraid of being unhappy. I don't want to be afraid of being alone. I don't want to be afraid of being unloved.
We are turning thirty. We aren't thirteen anymore. Look at us, we're grown-ups.
You have bewitched me, body and soul, and I love, I love, I love you. I never wish to be parted from you from this day forth.
I love you. Most ardently.
You must know... surely, you must know, it was all for you.
Life is like a box of chocolates. You never know what you're gonna get.
I'm not a smart man, but I know what love is.
My mama always said you've got to put the past behind you before you can move on.
I'm the king of the world!
Winning that ticket, Rose, was the best thing that ever happened to me. It brought me to you.
Promise me you'll survive. That you won't give up, no matter what happens, no matter how hopeless.
Here's looking at you, kid.
Of all the gin joints in all the towns in all the world, she walks into mine.
We'll always have Paris.
When you realize you want to spend the rest of your life with somebody, you want the rest of your life to start as soon as possible.
I love that you get cold when it's 71 degrees out. I love that it takes you an hour and a half to order a sandwich.
I'll have what she's having.
I'm gonna make him an offer he can't refuse.
It's not personal, Sonny. It's strictly business.
Leave the gun. Take the cannoli.
Hope is a good thing, maybe the best of things, and no good thing ever dies.
Get busy living, or get busy dying.
Fear can hold you prisoner. Hope can set you free.
I'm gonna get medieval on your ass.
English, motherfucker, do you speak it?
We should have shotguns for this kind of deal.
To infinity and beyond!
There's a snake in my boot!
You are a toy! You aren't the real Buzz Lightyear! You're an action figure! You are a child's plaything!
You mustn't be afraid to dream a little bigger, darling.
An idea is like a virus. Resilient. Highly contagious.
You're waiting for a train. A train that will take you far away.
To me, you are perfect.
If you look for it, I've got a sneaky feeling you'll find that love actually is all around.
Tell her that you love her. You've got nothing to lose and you'll always regret it if you don't.

movie_title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind

quotes.text: You can erase someone from your mind. Getting them out of your heart is another story.
I'm just a fucked-up girl who's lookin' for my own peace of mind; don't assign me yours.
What a loss to spend that much time with someone, only to find out that she's a stranger.
I hate the way I don't hate you. Not even close, not even a little bit, not even at all.
Don't let anyone ever make you feel like you don't deserve what you want.
You don't always have to be who they want you to be, you know?
I'm just a girl, standing in front of a boy, asking him to love her.
I live in Notting Hill. You live in Beverly Hills. Everyone in the world knows who you are.
Surreal but nice.
It's amazing, Molly. The love inside? You take it with you.
Molly, you're in danger.
Ditto.
You complete me.
You had me at hello.
Show me the money!
I apologize for the blunt delivery, but as problematical as this fact may be, I am in love... with you.
You're supposed to be the leading lady of your own life, for god's sake!
I've found almost everything ever written about love to be true.

movie_title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring

quotes.text: I would rather share one lifetime with you than face all the ages of this world alone.
All we have to decide is what to do with the time that is given us.
One ring to rule them all, one ring to find them, one ring to bring them all and in the darkness bind them.
As you wish.
Death cannot stop true love. All it can do is delay it for a while.
Hello. My name is Inigo Montoya. You killed my father. Prepare to die.
The truth of it is, I've loved you from the first second I met you.
I love you. I'm sorry I didn't tell you earlier. But I do.
Is it still raining? I hadn't noticed.
And she rescues him right back.
I want the fairy tale.
Welcome to Hollywood! What's your dream?
Nobody puts Baby in a corner.

I'm scared of everything. I'm scared of what I saw. I'm scared of what I did, of who I am. And most of all, I'm scared of walking out of this room and never feeling the rest of my whole life the way I feel when I'm with you.
This is my dance space. This is your dance space.
I hope it's okay if I love you forever.
I just wanted to take another look at you.
Look at me. All you gotta do is trust me.
The greatest thing you'll ever learn is just to love and be loved in return.
Love is like oxygen. Love is a many splendored thing. Love lifts us up where we belong. All you need is love!
Come what may, I will love you until my dying day.
And I... will always love you.
I'm your bodyguard, not your babysitter.
I don't want to talk about it. I'm paid to protect you, not to be your friend.
I fell in love with him the way you fall asleep. Slowly, and then all at once.
Some infinities are bigger than other infinities.
You gave me a forever within the numbered days, and I'm grateful.
I wish I knew how to quit you.
Tell you what, we coulda had a good life together. A real good life.
Jack, I swear...
This kind of certainty comes but just once in a lifetime.
I gave my life to my family. I wish I could give you what's left of me.
In a universe of ambiguity, this kind of certainty comes only once, and never again, no matter how many lifetimes you live.
I'm Batman.
You either die a hero or you live long enough to see yourself become the villain.
Why so serious?
Don't ever let somebody tell you you can't do something. You got a dream, you gotta protect it.
People can't do somethin' themselves, they wanna tell you you can't do it.
This part of my life, this little part, is called 'Happyness.'
Houston, we have a problem.
We've never lost an American in space we're sure as hell not gonna lose one now.
Failure is not an option.
It's not your fault.
Real loss is only possible when you love something more than you love yourself.
I have to go see about a girl.
Earn this.
Just give me a clean line of sight to the target.
Tell me I've led a good life. Tell me I'm a good man.
Remember... all I'm offering is the truth. Nothing more.
There is no spoon.
I know kung fu.
The first rule of Fight Club is: You do not talk about Fight Club.
It's only after we've lost everything that we're free to do anything.
You met me at a very strange time in my life.
What we do in life echoes in eternity.
Are you not entertained? Are you not entertained? Is this not why you are here?
My name is Maximus Decimus Meridius, commander of the Armies of the North...
We used to look up at the sky and wonder at our place in the stars, now we just look down and worry about our place in the dirt.
Love is the one thing that we're capable of perceiving that transcends dimensions of time and space.
Do not go gentle into that good night. Rage, rage against the dying of the light.
